consistency.damage_scaling_logic: Consistent with standard D&D 5e scaling (1d8 per slot level above 1st).

quality.completeness: Complete, containing all standard spell fields (name, level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, description, classes).
quality.clarity: The description is clear, detailing primary effect (damage/push) and secondary effects (unsecured objects, sound).
quality.formatting_notes: Uses standard bolding for 'At Higher Levels'.

mechanics.primary_effect: 2d8 thunder damage and 10ft push on failed save (half damage, no push on success).
mechanics.area_of_effect: 15-foot cube originating from the caster (Self-centered AoE).
mechanics.class_availability: Covers appropriate primary arcane/natural caster classes (Bard, Druid, Sorcerer, Wizard).
